## Summary

<!-- What does this change, and why? Link any related issue. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / internal
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Other:

## How verified

<!-- Commands you ran, manual steps, screenshots. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` and `pnpm typecheck:workers` pass
- [ ] `pnpm build` passes
- [ ] `pnpm test:unit` passes (and `pnpm -C e2e test` if the comment overlay changed)
- [ ] Conventional Commit title (e.g. `fix(serving): ...`)
- [ ] Updated docs / `.env.example` / `CHANGELOG.md` if behavior or config changed
